# 10-KB — Compiled Knowledge Base (Wiki Layer)

**Purpose:** LLM-distilled, cross-referenced canonical knowledge. Auto-generated by the KB-compiler nightly.
**Writers:** `kb-compiler.py` (03:00 via memory-orchestrator) + `kb-compiler-llm-synth.py` (LLM synthesis pass).
**Readers:** all agents + human + `vault-memory-mcp` (via `search_kb` tool).

## Files
- 10 canonical articles: `atlas-hallucination-prevention.md`, `board-hygiene.md`, `build-deploy-regeln.md`, `deploy-contracts.md`, `incident-response.md`, `memory-architecture.md`, `receipt-discipline.md`, `scope-governance.md`, `sprint-orchestration.md`, `sub-agent-coordination.md`.
- `_index.md` — auto-rebuilt entry-point listing all articles with fact/rule counts.

## Rules
- **Read-only.** Do not hand-edit — the KB-compiler will overwrite your changes at the next cron run.
- Source-of-truth is `.openclaw/workspace/memory/rules.jsonl` + `facts/*.jsonl`. Edit there if you need to affect content here.
- `vault-memory-mcp` exposes `search_kb(query, k=5)` — use that instead of grepping manually.

## Never touch
- Any `.md` in this folder. Full stop.
